title: エンディング（ノーマル）

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My first three years with Yaeno Muteki have
come to a close.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She has achieved great success in the Twinkle
Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And I believe she's grown physically and mentally
as a result of her battles against numerous rivals.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Hup!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Yaaah!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Ah, Master!
choice_data_list: Hello! I hope you don't mind my being here.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't aware that you were visiting, Trainer.
Please forgive me for not being prepared.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text: So, what brings you here today?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
We've passed the three-year mark in the Twinkle
Series, so we've come to inform you of our
progress.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text: Go ahead, then.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I've undergone many races while holding the
Kongo Yaegaki principle of blaze fierce, water
still in my heart.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
However, the Twinkle Series was replete with
powerful opponents.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I could sense my limits as I pitted my own
weak-willed self against stalwart adversaries.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
But even in the face of mighty foes, I refused to
yield. My raging emotions pined for the top.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to win. I wanted to defeat everyone,
prevail over the one who presided at the top, and
attain the glory of being the strongest.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: And to sate my thirst for victory...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I made the decision to go beyond our teachings
and give in to my emotions, changing my
competitive drive into a source of strength.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...In doing so, I went against the Kongo Yaegaki
teaching that dictates one must suppress one's
desire for recognition.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I emphasize how I think she made the right
decision and that it was a necessary move for her
to defeat her rivals.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, Trainer has led me on the right path, as a
trainer should.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I personally have no regrets about unleashing my
blazing emotions.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
However... despite my desire to show you and
Grandmother my growth through the Twinkle
Series...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
My inability to abandon my desire for
acknowledgement has only proved that I haven't
grown at all.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I am terribly sorry for having besmirched the
reputation of the Kongo Yaegaki style!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki's grandfather takes in everything
she says without comment. After some
contemplation, he finally breaks the silence.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
Hm... What about you, Trainer? Do you think
Yaeno has failed to grow?
choice_data_list: I don't think that at all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Throughout the last three years, Yaeno Muteki
has continually strived to win despite the variety
of obstacles she's encountered.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Not to mention she's triumphed over many a mighty adversary. What is that if not a sign of growth!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
I agree. To fully embrace one's weakness without
averting one's gaze from it is also a form of
growth.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...Master!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
I've watched Yaeno's running for the past three
years. For that reason, I'm well aware of where her
growth stems from.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
And knowing all that, I must say—Yaeno, you've
done well.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Gramp—I mean Mast—Grampaaa!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Overcome with emotion and shedding tears of
happiness, Yaeno Muteki throws herself into her
grandfather's loving arms.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Trainer. Thank you so much for everything these
past three years.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It's thanks to you that I was able to show Grampa
and everyone else that I've grown.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
But as you know, I still have much to learn. I'll
likely require further guidance as I continue on
this journey.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...Will you continue to accompany me on my
path?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe... Great! Then I shall be counting on you
for many years to come!
